docs.title: Class: ReactionMonitoring
docs.text:
A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results.

URI: prov:Activity

 classDiagram
    class ReactionMonitoring
    click ReactionMonitoring href "../ReactionMonitoring/"
      DataGeneratingActivity <|-- ReactionMonitoring
        click DataGeneratingActivity href "../DataGeneratingActivity/"

      ReactionMonitoring : carried_out_by





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" AgenticEntity : carried_out_by
        click AgenticEntity href "../AgenticEntity/"



      ReactionMonitoring : description

      ReactionMonitoring : evaluated_activity





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" ChemicalReaction : evaluated_activity
        click ChemicalReaction href "../ChemicalReaction/"



      ReactionMonitoring : evaluated_entity





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" EvaluatedEntity : evaluated_entity
        click EvaluatedEntity href "../EvaluatedEntity/"



      ReactionMonitoring : had_input_activity





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" Activity : had_input_activity
        click Activity href "../Activity/"



      ReactionMonitoring : had_input_entity





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" Entity : had_input_entity
        click Entity href "../Entity/"



      ReactionMonitoring : had_output_entity





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" Entity : had_output_entity
        click Entity href "../Entity/"



      ReactionMonitoring : has_part





        ReactionMonitoring --> "*" Activity : has_part
        click Activity href "../Activity/"



      ReactionMonitoring : has_qualitative_attribute





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" QualitativeAttribute : has_qualitative_attribute
        click QualitativeAttribute href "../QualitativeAttribute/"



      ReactionMonitoring : has_quantitative_attribute





        ReactionMonitoring --> "* _recommended_" QuantitativeAttribute : has_quantitative_attribute
        click QuantitativeAttribute href "../QuantitativeAttribute/"



      ReactionMonitoring : id

      ReactionMonitoring : occurred_in





        ReactionMonitoring --> "0..1" Surrounding : occurred_in
        click Surrounding href "../Surrounding/"



      ReactionMonitoring : other_identifier





        ReactionMonitoring --> "*" Identifier : other_identifier
        click Identifier href "../Identifier/"



      ReactionMonitoring : part_of





        ReactionMonitoring --> "*" Activity : part_of
        click Activity href "../Activity/"



      ReactionMonitoring : rdf_type





        ReactionMonitoring --> "0..1 _recommended_" DefinedTerm : rdf_type
        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"



      ReactionMonitoring : realized_plan





        ReactionMonitoring --> "0..1" Plan : realized_plan
        click Plan href "../Plan/"



      ReactionMonitoring : title

      ReactionMonitoring : type





        ReactionMonitoring --> "0..1" DefinedTerm : type
        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• Activity [ ClassifierMixin]
    • DataGeneratingActivity
      • ReactionMonitoring

docs.title: Class Properties
docs.text: Property Value Class URI prov:Activity

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance evaluated_entity * recommended EvaluatedEntity The slot to specify the Entity about which the DataGeneratingActivity produced information. DataGeneratingActivity evaluated_activity * recommended ChemicalReaction The slot to specify the ChemicalReaction being recorded. DataGeneratingActivity realized_plan 0..1  Plan The slot to specify the Plan (i.e. directive information or procedure) that was realized by an Activity. DataGeneratingActivity occurred_in 0..1  Surrounding The slot to specify the Surrounding in which an Activity took place. DataGeneratingActivity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Activity title *  String The slot to provide a title for the Activity. Activity description *  String The slot to provide a description for the Activity. Activity other_identifier *  Identifier The slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Activity. Activity has_part *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity that is part of the Activity. Activity had_input_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was used as an input of an Activity that is to be changed, consumed or transformed. Activity had_output_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was generated as an output of an Activity. Activity had_input_activity * recommended Activity The slot to provide a previous Activity that informed the Activity by being causally via a shared participant. Activity carried_out_by * recommended AgenticEntity The slot to specify the AgenticEntity that played a certain part in carrying out the Activity, either via having a specific role, function or disposition that was realized in the Activity. Activity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity part_of *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity of which the Activity is a part. Activity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Class: ReactionMonitoringDataset
docs.text:
A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class.

URI: dcat:Dataset

docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance access_rights 0..1  RightsStatement Information that indicates whether the Dataset is publicly accessible, has access restrictions or is not public. Dataset applicable_legislation *  LegalResource The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. Dataset conforms_to *  Standard An implementing rule or other specification. Dataset contact_point * recommended Kind Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. Dataset creator *  Agent An entity responsible for producing the dataset. Dataset dataset_distribution *  Distribution An available Distribution for the Dataset. Dataset description 1..*  String A free-text account of the Dataset. Dataset documentation *  Document A page or document about this Dataset. Dataset frequency 0..1  Frequency The frequency at which the Dataset is updated. Dataset geographical_coverage *  Location A geographic region that is covered by the Dataset. Dataset has_version *  Dataset A related Dataset that is a version, edition, or adaptation of the described Dataset. Dataset identifier *  String The main identifier for the Dataset, e.g. the URI or other unique identifier in the context of the Catalogue. Dataset in_series *  DatasetSeries A dataset series of which the dataset is part. Dataset is_referenced_by *  Resource A related resource, such as a publication, that references, cites, or otherwise points to the dataset. Dataset keyword * recommended String A keyword or tag describing the Dataset. Dataset landing_page *  Document A web page that provides access to the Dataset, its Distributions and/or additional information. Dataset language *  LinguisticSystem A language of the Dataset. Dataset modification_date 0..1  Date The most recent date on which the Dataset was changed or modified. Dataset other_identifier *  Identifier A secondary identifier of the Dataset Dataset provenance *  ProvenanceStatement A statement about the lineage of a Dataset. Dataset publisher 0..1  Agent An entity (organisation) responsible for making the Dataset available. Dataset qualified_attribution *  Attribution An Agent having some form of responsibility for the resource. Dataset qualified_relation *  Relationship A description of a relationship with another resource. Dataset related_resource *  Resource A related resource. Dataset release_date 0..1  Date The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Dataset. Dataset sample *  Distribution A sample distribution of the dataset. Dataset source *  Dataset A related Dataset from which the described Dataset is derived. Dataset spatial_resolution 0..1  Decimal The minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset, measured in meters. Dataset temporal_coverage *  PeriodOfTime A temporal period that the Dataset covers. Dataset temporal_resolution 0..1  Duration The minimum time period resolvable in the dataset. Dataset theme * recommended Concept A category of the Dataset. Dataset title 1..*  String A name given to the Dataset. Dataset type *  Concept A type of the Dataset. Dataset version 0..1  String The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource. Dataset version_notes *  String A description of the differences between this version and a previous version of the Dataset. Dataset was_generated_by 1..*  ReactionMonitoring The slot to specify the ReactionMonitoring activity that produced this dataset. Dataset id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Dataset is_about_entity * recommended EvaluatedEntity A slot to provide the EvaluatedEntity a Dataset is about. Dataset is_about_activity * recommended ChemicalReaction The slot to specify the ChemicalReaction this dataset is about. Dataset

docs.title: Class: Reactor
docs.text:
A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process.

URI: AFE:0000153

 classDiagram
    class Reactor
    click Reactor href "../Reactor/"
      MaterialisticMixin <|-- Reactor
        click MaterialisticMixin href "../MaterialisticMixin/"
      Device <|-- Reactor
        click Device href "../Device/"

      Reactor : alternative_label

      Reactor : description

      Reactor : has_density





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Density : has_density
        click Density href "../Density/"



      Reactor : has_mass





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Mass : has_mass
        click Mass href "../Mass/"



      Reactor : has_part





        Reactor --> "*" Device : has_part
        click Device href "../Device/"



      Reactor : has_physical_state





        Reactor --> "0..1" PhysicalStateEnum : has_physical_state
        click PhysicalStateEnum href "../PhysicalStateEnum/"



      Reactor : has_pressure





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Pressure : has_pressure
        click Pressure href "../Pressure/"



      Reactor : has_qualitative_attribute





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" QualitativeAttribute : has_qualitative_attribute
        click QualitativeAttribute href "../QualitativeAttribute/"



      Reactor : has_quantitative_attribute





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" QuantitativeAttribute : has_quantitative_attribute
        click QuantitativeAttribute href "../QuantitativeAttribute/"



      Reactor : has_temperature





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Temperature : has_temperature
        click Temperature href "../Temperature/"



      Reactor : has_volume





        Reactor --> "* _recommended_" Volume : has_volume
        click Volume href "../Volume/"



      Reactor : id

      Reactor : other_identifier





        Reactor --> "*" Identifier : other_identifier
        click Identifier href "../Identifier/"



      Reactor : part_of





        Reactor --> "*" AgenticEntity : part_of
        click AgenticEntity href "../AgenticEntity/"



      Reactor : rdf_type





        Reactor --> "0..1 _recommended_" DefinedTerm : rdf_type
        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"



      Reactor : title

      Reactor : type





        Reactor --> "0..1" DefinedTerm : type
        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. AgenticEntity title 0..1  String This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. AgenticEntity description 0..1  String This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. AgenticEntity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier for a Device. AgenticEntity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity AgenticEntity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity AgenticEntity has_part *  Device The slot to specify parts of a Device that are themselves Devices. AgenticEntity part_of *  AgenticEntity The slot to provide the AgenticEntity of which theAgenticEntity is a part. AgenticEntity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance has_molar_equivalent * recommended MolarEquivalent A slot to provide the MolarEquivalent of a ChemicalSubstance, such as the DissolvingSubstance, Starting Material or Reactant, within the context of a chemical reaction. direct has_concentration * recommended Concentration The slot to provide the Concentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of * recommended ChemicalEntity The slot to provide the chemical entities of which a ChemicalSubstance is composed of. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin title 0..1  String The slot to provide a title for the Entity. Entity description 0..1  String The slot to provide a description for the Entity. Entity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Entity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier of the Entity. Entity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_part * recommended MaterialEntity The slot to provide the parts of a MaterialEntity. Entity part_of *  Entity The slot to specify an Entity of which the Entity is a part. Entity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

docs.title: Class: SubstanceMSSample
docs.text:
A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS).

__

URI: MS:1000457

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance solvent 1  ChemicalEntity A solvent used in liquid mass spectrometry (MS) for sample preparation. MSSample injection_volume 1  Volume The volume of liquid sample injected into the mass spectrometer for analysis. MSSample has_concentration * recommended Concentration The concentration of the compound analysed in a mass spectrometry (MS) sample using data acquired from a mass spectrometry (MS) analysis ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_ph_value * recommended PHValue The slot to provide the PHValue of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin composed_of 1..* recommended ChemicalEntity Analysed Compound : A compound analysed in an mass spectrometry (MS) sample using data acquired from an mass spectrometry (MS) analysis. ChemicalSubstanceMixin has_amount * recommended AmountOfSubstance The slot to provide the AmountConcentration of a ChemicalSubstance. ChemicalSubstanceMixin derived_from 0..1  Entity The slot to specify the MaterialEntity or MaterialSample from which the MaterialSample was created. MaterialSample alternative_label 0..1  String The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_physical_state 0..1  PhysicalStateEnum The slot to specify the physical state of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_temperature * recommended Temperature The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin has_mass * recommended Mass The slot to provide the Mass of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_volume * recommended Volume The slot to provide the Volume of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_density * recommended Density The slot to provide the Density of a MaterialEntity. MaterialisticMixin has_pressure * recommended Pressure The slot to provide data about the pressure of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the Pressure of an Activity is ontologically a quality borne by the material entities participating in the Activity. MaterialisticMixin was_generated_by *  Activity A slot to provide the Activity which created the EvaluatedEntity. EvaluatedEntity title 0..1  String The slot to provide a title for the EvaluatedEntity. Entity description 0..1  String The slot to provide a description for the EvaluatedEntity. Entity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Entity other_identifier *  Identifier A slot to provide a secondary identifier of the EvaluatedEntity. Entity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Entity has_part *  Entity A slot to provide a part of the Entity. Entity part_of *  Entity The slot to specify an Entity of which the Entity is a part. Entity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. ClassifierMixin rdf_type 0..1 recommended DefinedTerm The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity. ClassifierMixin

name: SubstanceMSSample
description: 'A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared
  for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS).

  '
from_schema: https://w3id.org/NFDI4Chem/ms-dcat-ap
is_a: SubstanceSample
mixins:
- MSSample
slot_usage:
  composed_of:
    name: composed_of
    description: 'Analysed Compound : A compound analysed in an mass spectrometry
      (MS) sample using data acquired from an mass spectrometry (MS) analysis.

      '
    required: true
  has_concentration:
    name: has_concentration
    description: 'The concentration of the compound analysed in a mass spectrometry
      (MS) sample using data acquired from a mass spectrometry (MS) analysis

      '
    recommended: true
class_uri: MS:1000457

docs.title: Class: SubstanceSampleCharacterization
docs.text:
A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results.

URI: prov:Activity

DataGeneratingActivity occurred_in 0..1  Surrounding The slot to specify the Surrounding in which an Activity took place. DataGeneratingActivity id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Activity title *  String The slot to provide a title for the Activity. Activity has_part *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity that is part of the Activity. Activity had_input_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was used as an input of an Activity that is to be changed, consumed or transformed. Activity had_output_entity * recommended Entity The slot to specify the Entity that was generated as an output of an Activity. Activity had_input_activity * recommended Activity The slot to provide a previous Activity that informed the Activity by being causally via a shared participant. Activity carried_out_by * recommended AgenticEntity The slot to specify the AgenticEntity that played a certain part in carrying out the Activity, either via having a specific role, function or disposition that was realized in the Activity. Activity has_qualitative_attribute * recommended QualitativeAttribute The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity has_quantitative_attribute * recommended QuantitativeAttribute The slot to relate a quantitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity Activity part_of *  Activity The slot to provide an Activity of which the Activity is a part. Activity type 0..1  DefinedTerm This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used. docs.title: Class: SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset
docs.text:
A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class.

URI: dcat:Dataset

docs.text: Name Cardinality and Range Description Inheritance access_rights 0..1  RightsStatement Information that indicates whether the Dataset is publicly accessible, has access restrictions or is not public. Dataset applicable_legislation *  LegalResource The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. Dataset conforms_to *  Standard An implementing rule or other specification. Dataset contact_point * recommended Kind Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. Dataset creator *  Agent An entity responsible for producing the dataset. Dataset dataset_distribution *  Distribution An available Distribution for the Dataset. Dataset description 1..*  String A free-text account of the Dataset. Dataset documentation *  Document A page or document about this Dataset. Dataset frequency 0..1  Frequency The frequency at which the Dataset is updated. Dataset geographical_coverage *  Location A geographic region that is covered by the Dataset. Dataset has_version *  Dataset A related Dataset that is a version, edition, or adaptation of the described Dataset. Dataset identifier *  String The main identifier for the Dataset, e.g. the URI or other unique identifier in the context of the Catalogue. Dataset in_series *  DatasetSeries A dataset series of which the dataset is part. Dataset is_referenced_by *  Resource A related resource, such as a publication, that references, cites, or otherwise points to the dataset. Dataset keyword * recommended String A keyword or tag describing the Dataset. Dataset landing_page *  Document A web page that provides access to the Dataset, its Distributions and/or additional information. Dataset language *  LinguisticSystem A language of the Dataset. Dataset modification_date 0..1  Date The most recent date on which the Dataset was changed or modified. Dataset other_identifier *  Identifier A secondary identifier of the Dataset Dataset provenance *  ProvenanceStatement A statement about the lineage of a Dataset. Dataset publisher 0..1  Agent An entity (organisation) responsible for making the Dataset available. Dataset qualified_attribution *  Attribution An Agent having some form of responsibility for the resource. Dataset qualified_relation *  Relationship A description of a relationship with another resource. Dataset related_resource *  Resource A related resource. Dataset release_date 0..1  Date The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Dataset. Dataset sample *  Distribution A sample distribution of the dataset. Dataset source *  Dataset A related Dataset from which the described Dataset is derived. Dataset spatial_resolution 0..1  Decimal The minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset, measured in meters. Dataset temporal_coverage *  PeriodOfTime A temporal period that the Dataset covers. Dataset temporal_resolution 0..1  Duration The minimum time period resolvable in the dataset. Dataset theme * recommended Concept A category of the Dataset. Dataset title 1..*  String A name given to the Dataset. Dataset type *  Concept A type of the Dataset. Dataset version 0..1  String The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource. Dataset version_notes *  String A description of the differences between this version and a previous version of the Dataset. Dataset was_generated_by 1..*  SubstanceSampleCharacterization The slot to specify the SubstanceCharacterization activity that produced this dataset. Dataset id 1  Uriorcurie A slot to provide an URI for an entity within this schema. Dataset is_about_entity * recommended SubstanceSample The slot to specify the SubstanceSample this dataset is about. Dataset is_about_activity * recommended EvaluatedActivity A slot to provide the EvaluatedActivity a Dataset is about. Dataset

docs.title: Type: Time
docs.text:
A time object represents a (local) time of day, independent of any particular day

URI: xsd:time

docs.title: Type Properties
docs.text: Property Value Base XSDTime Type URI xsd:time Representation str

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• URI is dateTime because OWL reasoners do not work with straight date or time
  • If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "time".

docs.title: Class: Yield
docs.text:
A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %).

URI: CHMO:0002855

 classDiagram
    class Yield
    click Yield href "../Yield/"
      QuantitativeAttribute <|-- Yield
        click QuantitativeAttribute href "../QuantitativeAttribute/"

        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"



      Yield : rdf_type





        Yield --> "0..1 _recommended_" DefinedTerm : rdf_type
        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"



      Yield : title

      Yield : type





        Yield --> "0..1" DefinedTerm : type
        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"



      Yield : unit





        Yield --> "0..1 _recommended_" DefinedTerm : unit
        click DefinedTerm href "../DefinedTerm/"



      Yield : value

docs.title: Slot: access_rights
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcterms:accessRights Alias: access_rights

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes

docs.title: Slot: alternative_label
docs.text:
The slot to specify an alternative label, name or title for a MaterialEntity.

URI: skos:altLabel Alias: alternative_label

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot MaterialisticMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all material entities. It is needed for example to have MaterialSample have the same properties as MaterialEntity, although it is defined as a subclass of EvaluatedEntity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no PolymerMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all chemical substances that are composed of macromolecules of different kinds and which may be differentiated by composition, length, degree of branching etc.. no SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no ChemicalSubstanceMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all material entities that are described in a chemical context via being composed of chemical entities (e.g. atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, complex, conformer etc., ) of the same type or of different types. no

docs.title: Slot: carried_out_by
docs.text:
The slot to specify the AgenticEntity that played a certain part in carrying out the Activity, either via having a specific role, function or disposition that was realized in the Activity.

URI: prov:wasAssociatedWith Alias: carried_out_by

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• carried_out_by
    • used_catalyst
    • used_solvent
    • used_reactor

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes

docs.title: Slot: description
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcterms:description Alias: description

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no IUPACName A systematic name which is formulated according to the rules and recommendations for chemical nomenclature set out by the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC). no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes LegalResource See DCAT-AP specs:LegalResource no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no MolecularFormula A structure descriptor which identifies each constituent element by its chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each discrete molecule of that compound. no Document See DCAT-AP specs:Document no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. yes LicenseDocument See DCAT-AP specs:LicenseDocument no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no Concept See DCAT-AP specs:Concept no Frequency See DCAT-AP specs:Frequency no ProvenanceStatement See DCAT-AP specs:ProvenanceStatement no ConceptScheme See DCAT-AP specs:ConceptScheme no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no InChIKey no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no Standard See DCAT-AP specs:Standard no Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no MediaTypeOrExtent See DCAT-AP specs:MediaTypeOrExtent no Pressure no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no RightsStatement See DCAT-AP specs:RightsStatement no Any This abstract class is needed to create the union of Dataset, DatasetSeries, Catalogue and DataService for the range of the slot primary_topic. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no LinguisticSystem See DCAT-AP specs:LinguisticSystem no Geometry See DCAT-AP specs:Geometry no Resource See DCAT-AP specs:Resource no Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes PeriodOfTime See DCAT-AP specs:PeriodOfTime no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no Policy See DCAT-AP specs:Policy no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no Role See DCAT-AP specs:Role no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Plan A piece of information that specifies how an activity has to be carried out by its agents including what kind of steps have to be taken and what kind of parameters have to be met/set. no ChecksumAlgorithm See DCAT-AP specs:ChecksumAlgorithm no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no TimeInstant See DCAT-AP specs:TimeInstant no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no Distribution See DCAT-AP specs:Distribution yes CatalogueRecord See DCAT-AP specs:CatalogueRecord yes PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no PHValue no Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab). no DatasetSeries See DCAT-AP specs:DatasetSeries yes Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes Identifier See DCAT-AP specs:Identifier no InChi A structure descriptor which conforms to the InChI format specification. no Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no Attribution See DCAT-AP specs:Attribution no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MediaType See DCAT-AP specs:MediaType no SupportiveEntity The supportive entities are supporting the main entities in the Application Profile. They are included in the Application Profile because they form the range of properties. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no Laboratory A facility that provides controlled conditions in which scientific or technological research, experiments, and measurement may be performed. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no

• had_input_activity
    • evaluated_activity

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. yes DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no

docs.title: Slot: frequency
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcterms:accrualPeriodicity Alias: frequency

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no DatasetSeries See DCAT-AP specs:DatasetSeries yes AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. yes EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. yes Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. yes ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. yes DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. yes AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. yes

docs.title: Slot: has_qualitative_attribute
docs.text:
The slot to relate a qualitative attribute to an EvaluatedEntity, EvaluatedActivity or AgenticEntity

URI: dcterms:relation Alias: has_qualitative_attribute

docs.text:
• has_qualitative_attribute

    • inchikey

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no

docs.title: Slot: has_quantity_type
docs.text:
The type of quality that is quantifiable according to the QUDT ontology.

URI: qudt:hasQuantityKind Alias: has_quantity_type

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no Pressure no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no PHValue no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no

docs.title: Slot: has_temperature
docs.text:
The slot to provide the Temperature of a MaterialEntity or an Activity, whereas the temperature of the Activity is ontologically rooted in the temperature of the material entities that participate in the Activity.

URI: SIO:000008 Alias: has_temperature

docs.title: Inheritance
docs.text:
• has_quantitative_attribute
    • has_temperature

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot MaterialisticMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all material entities. It is needed for example to have MaterialSample have the same properties as MaterialEntity, although it is defined as a subclass of EvaluatedEntity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no PolymerMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all chemical substances that are composed of macromolecules of different kinds and which may be differentiated by composition, length, degree of branching etc.. no SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. yes SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no ChemicalSubstanceMixin A LinkML mixin used to pass down properties common to all material entities that are described in a chemical context via being composed of chemical entities (e.g. atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, complex, conformer etc., ) of the same type or of different types. no

docs.title: Slot: has_version
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcat:hasVersion Alias: has_version

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes Distribution See DCAT-AP specs:Distribution yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no CatalogueRecord See DCAT-AP specs:CatalogueRecord yes DatasetSeries See DCAT-AP specs:DatasetSeries yes AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes

docs.title: Slot: occurred_in
docs.text:
The slot to specify the Surrounding in which an Activity took place.

URI: prov:atLocation Alias: occurred_in

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no

docs.text: Property Value Range Surrounding Domain Of DataGeneratingActivity Slot URI prov:atLocation

docs.title: Slot: other_identifier
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: adms:identifier Alias: other_identifier

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. yes Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. yes ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. yes Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. yes

This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity.
