docs.title: Slot: rdf_type
docs.text:
The slot to specify the ontology class that is instantiated by an entity.

URI: rdf:type Alias: rdf_type

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no IUPACName A systematic name which is formulated according to the rules and recommendations for chemical nomenclature set out by the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC). no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no InChi A structure descriptor which conforms to the InChI format specification. no MolecularFormula A structure descriptor which identifies each constituent element by its chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each discrete molecule of that compound. no Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no Pressure no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity no ClassifierMixin A mixin with which an entity of this schema can be classified via an additional rdf:type or dcterms:type assertion. no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no Plan A piece of information that specifies how an activity has to be carried out by its agents including what kind of steps have to be taken and what kind of parameters have to be met/set. no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no Laboratory A facility that provides controlled conditions in which scientific or technological research, experiments, and measurement may be performed. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no PHValue no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no InChIKey no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab). no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. yes Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no

docs.title: Slot: spatial_resolution
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcat:spatialResolutionInMeters Alias: spatial_resolution

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Distribution See DCAT-AP specs:Distribution yes AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no DatasetSeries See DCAT-AP specs:DatasetSeries yes AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes

docs.title: Slot: title
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcterms:title Alias: title

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot SubstanceSampleCharacterization A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a SubstanceSample, such as a spectroscopic measurement, a physical property determination, or a combined measurement-and-analysis workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw data acquisition and subsequent data processing or analysis. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw measurement from derived results. no EvaluatedActivity An activity or process that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. no Volume A measure of regions in three-dimensional space. no IUPACName A systematic name which is formulated according to the rules and recommendations for chemical nomenclature set out by the International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC). no EvaluatedEntity An Entity that is being evaluated in a DataGeneratingActivity. yes LegalResource See DCAT-AP specs:LegalResource no AmountOfSubstance The total amount of substance used in a ChemicalReaction. no MolecularFormula A structure descriptor which identifies each constituent element by its chemical symbol and indicates the number of atoms of each element found in each discrete molecule of that compound. no Document See DCAT-AP specs:Document no ChemicalProduct A chemical substance that is produced by a ChemicalReaction. no Entity A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects; entities may be real or imaginary. yes LicenseDocument See DCAT-AP specs:LicenseDocument no MolarMass A Mass (physical quality) that quantifies the mass of a homogeneous ChemicalSubstance containing 6.02 x 10^23 atoms or molecules. no Software An instrument composed of a series of instructions that can be interpreted by or directly executed by a computer. no Concept See DCAT-AP specs:Concept no Frequency See DCAT-AP specs:Frequency no ProvenanceStatement See DCAT-AP specs:ProvenanceStatement no ConceptScheme See DCAT-AP specs:ConceptScheme yes SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no InChIKey no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no QuantitativeAttribute A quantifiable piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no Standard See DCAT-AP specs:Standard no Concentration A QuantitativeAttribute of a ChemicalSubstance that represents the amount of a constituent divided by the volume of the mixture. no MediaTypeOrExtent See DCAT-AP specs:MediaTypeOrExtent no Pressure no StartingMaterial A ChemicalSubstance with that has a starting material role in a synthesis. no MolarEquivalent A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no RightsStatement See DCAT-AP specs:RightsStatement no Any This abstract class is needed to create the union of Dataset, DatasetSeries, Catalogue and DataService for the range of the slot primary_topic. no DataGeneratingActivity An Activity (process) that has the objective to produce information (in form of a dataset) about another Activity or Entity. no ReactionMonitoring A DataGeneratingActivity that produces data about a ChemicalReaction, such as reaction monitoring, experimental documentation, or a combined recording-and-evaluation workflow. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that does not distinguish between raw experimental recording and subsequent data evaluation. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need this distinction should define their own DataGeneratingActivity subclasses and use the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis chain to separate raw data from derived results. no AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no LinguisticSystem See DCAT-AP specs:LinguisticSystem no Geometry See DCAT-AP specs:Geometry no Resource See DCAT-AP specs:Resource no Catalogue See DCAT-AP specs:Catalogue yes PeriodOfTime See DCAT-AP specs:PeriodOfTime no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no DefinedTerm A word, name, acronym or phrase that is defined in a controlled vocabulary (CV) and that is used to provide an additional rdf:type or dcterms:type of a class within this schema. yes Policy See DCAT-AP specs:Policy no Reagent A ChemicalSubstance that is consumed or transformed in a ChemicalReaction. no ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no MaterialMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of unknown composition (material) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no Role See DCAT-AP specs:Role no MaterialEntity A material is an Entity that has some portion of matter as proper part. no Plan A piece of information that specifies how an activity has to be carried out by its agents including what kind of steps have to be taken and what kind of parameters have to be met/set. no ChecksumAlgorithm See DCAT-AP specs:ChecksumAlgorithm no ChemicalReaction A process that leads to the transformation of one set of chemical substances to another and that is the subject matter of a DataGeneratingActivity. no TimeInstant See DCAT-AP specs:TimeInstant no Density A measure of the mass per unit volume of a substance. no Distribution See DCAT-AP specs:Distribution yes CatalogueRecord See DCAT-AP specs:CatalogueRecord yes PercentageOfTotal A dimensionless ratio that quantifies the stoichiometric proportion of a chemical substance relative to a reference substance in a chemical reaction. no PHValue no Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab). no DatasetSeries See DCAT-AP specs:DatasetSeries yes Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes DataService See DCAT-AP specs:DataService yes Identifier See DCAT-AP specs:Identifier no InChi A structure descriptor which conforms to the InChI format specification. no Mass The strength of a body's gravitational attraction to other bodies. no Attribution See DCAT-AP specs:Attribution no Activity See DCAT-AP specs:Activity yes SubstanceMSSample A mass spectrometry sample of known composition (substance) prepared for and investigated by Mass Spectrometry (MS). no MediaType See DCAT-AP specs:MediaType no SupportiveEntity The supportive entities are supporting the main entities in the Application Profile. They are included in the Application Profile because they form the range of properties. no ChemicalEntity Any constitutionally or isotopically distinct atom, molecule, ion, ion pair, radical, radical ion, complex, conformer etc., identifiable as a separately distinguishable entity. no DataAnalysis An Activity that evaluates the data produced by another Activity. no Laboratory A facility that provides controlled conditions in which scientific or technological research, experiments, and measurement may be performed. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no

Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no SubstanceSample A MaterialSample derived from a chemical substance that is of interest in an analytical procedure. no AnalysisSourceData Information that was evaluated within a DataAnalysis. no InChIKey no MaterialSample A Sample that was derived from a previous MaterialSample or some other kind of MaterialEntity. no DissolvingSubstance A liquid ChemicalSubstance that dissolves or that is capable of dissolving a ChemicalSubstance. no Surrounding The surrounding in which the dataset creating activity took place (e.g. a lab). no Catalyst A ChemicalSubstance or MaterialEntity that initiates or accelerates a ChemicalReaction without itself being affected. no Agent See DCAT-AP specs:Agent yes PolymerSample A SubstanceSample derived from a Polymer. no QualitativeAttribute A piece of information that is attributed to an Entity, Activity or AgenticEntity. no SMILES A structure descriptor that denotes a molecular structure as a graph and conforms to the SMILES format specification. no Temperature A physical quantity that quantitatively expresses the attribute of hotness or coldness. no Reactor A reactor is a container for controlling a biological or chemical reaction or process. no Yield A dimensionless physical quantity describing the fraction of a product B that is formed from a reactant A taking into account the stoichiometry. If A fully reacts to B without side-reactions, the yield of product B is 1 (or 100 %). no Atom An Entity constituting the smallest component of a chemical element having the chemical properties of the element. no Device A material instrument that is designed to perform a function primarily by means of its mechanical or electrical nature. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes AgenticEntity An entity that is somehow responsible for an Activity to take place. no

docs.title: Slot: version
docs.text:
This slot is described in more detail within the class in which it is used.

URI: dcat:version Alias: version

docs.title: Applicable Classes
docs.text: Name Description Modifies Slot AnalysisDataset A Dataset that was generated by an analysis of some previously generated data. For example, a dataset that contains the data of an assignment of a chemical structure to a sample based on the spectral data obtained from the sample is an AnalyticalDataset. no SubstanceSampleCharacterizationDataset A Dataset about a SubstanceSample that was produced by a SubstanceSampleCharacterization activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates measurement and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish raw measurement from post-processing or structure assignment should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no Dataset A collection of data, published or curated by a single agent, and available for access or download in one or more representations. yes ReactionMonitoringDataset A Dataset about a ChemicalReaction that was produced by a ReactionMonitoring activity. This is a coarse-grained convenience shape that conflates experimental documentation and analysis into a single data-generating activity. Domain-specific sub-profiles that need to distinguish reaction monitoring from subsequent data evaluation should define their own Dataset subclasses, potentially using the DCAT-AP+ DataAnalysis/AnalysisDataset chain instead of reusing this class. no
